custom_greeting: Thanks for calling Summit Comfort, this is Ava, how can I help?
company_tagline: Austin's family-owned HVAC for three generations
services_offered: AC repair, furnace install, duct cleaning, heat pump service
pricing_policy: We charge a diagnostic fee then quote
financing_details: 0% APR for 12 months on qualifying installs
payment_methods: Cash, check, Visa, Mastercard, Amex, ACH
transfer_triggers: Caller requests a live person, Emergency situation, Commercial customer, Existing customer callback
transfer_behavior: Try once - take message if no answer
unique_selling_points: Three-generation family business, NATE certified techs, upfront pricing
seasonal_services: Summer AC tune-ups, winter furnace inspections
do_not_service: Commercial rooftop units over 10 tons, geothermal
additional_info: All techs are background-checked and drug-tested. We carry $2M liability insurance.
